title: Horimiya
genre: Romance, Comedy, Slince of Life, Drama
synopsis:
Synopsis in English
Kyoko Hori is a popular and bright high school student who excels academically and appears perfect in front of her classmates. However, outside school, she is a homespun, responsible older sister taking care of her younger brother, Souta, and managing household chores, while hiding this side of herself to maintain her social image.
Izumi Miyamura is Hori?s classmate who seems gloomy, quiet, and bookish at school, but he has a very different personality outside: laid-back, friendly, with piercings and tattoos, and not particularly strong academically.
One day, Souta gets a nosebleed and comes home with Miyamura, who he introduces to Hori. Recognizing each other?s true selves gradually, Hori and Miyamura agree to keep their after-school identities secret. This sparks a genuine friendship that slowly turns into a sweet romance as they spend more time together and help each other navigate life at school and at home.
Over time, they confront misunderstandings, support friends through their own challenges, and their relationship develops into a loving partnership. Throughout the series, their classmates? stories and side plots intertwine, adding humor, heartfelt drama, and relatable high school experiences

title: Horimiya
genre: Romance, Comedy, Slice of Love, School, Drama

title: Horimiya
genre: Romance, Comedy, Slice of Love, School, Drama
synopsis:
English Version:
Horimiya follows Kyoko Hori, a popular girl who hides her busy domestic life, and Izumi Miyamura, a quiet boy who conceals his piercings and tattoos. After accidentally discovering each other's secret identities outside school, they form a close bond. This shared secret eventually turns into a sweet romance, exploring their personal growth and the lives of their friends.

Bengali Version (বাংলা):
স্কুলে জনপ্রিয় Hori আসলে বাড়িতে ব্যস্ত এক দায়িত্বশীল মেয়ে, আর শান্ত স্বভাবের Miyamura-র স্কুলের বাইরে রয়েছে Tattoos ও Piercings ভরা একদম ভিন্ন এক লুক। একদিন হঠাত করেই তারা একে অপরের এই Secret Identity জেনে ফেলে। নিজেদের আসল রূপ গোপন রাখার এই চুক্তি থেকেই তাদের মধ্যে গভীর বন্ধুত্ব ও পরে এক মিষ্টি Romance গড়ে ওঠে। মূলত তাদের এই Double Life এবং বন্ধুদের সাথে কাটানো মজার ও আবেগপূর্ণ মুহূর্ত নিয়েই এই Anime।
